_comment: Manual descriptions for FM Kit components (Figma REST API returns none). Update here when components change.
FM App_header: Top-level application header bar. Contains the Actian logo, product label, and user avatar. Use at the top of every screen.
FM Side navigation bar: Vertical sidebar navigation panel (260px wide). Contains navigation items with placeholder labels and an active-state highlight.
FM Side navigation item: Individual row inside the sidebar. Use On for active, Off for default, Placeholder for non-essential items.
FM Tabs: Horizontal tab bar for switching between content sections within a page. Place below the page header.
FM Tab: Individual tab within an FM Tabs bar. Use On for active with underline indicator, Off for inactive.
FM Sidepanel: Slide-in panel from the right edge. Used for detail views, edit forms, or secondary actions.
FM Menu: Dropdown menu container that appears on click. Use for action menus, context menus, or create dropdowns.
FM Menu item: Individual row inside an FM Menu.
FM Button: Action trigger. Primary for main task, Secondary for alternative, Outline for less prominent actions.
FM Icon Buttons: Icon-only action button. Use for toolbar actions or compact UI.
FM Text input field: Single-line text input. Variants: Empty, Placeholder, Default (filled), Disabled.
FM Text Area: Multi-line text input for longer content like descriptions or notes.
FM Search input field: Text input with search icon. Use for filtering or querying content.
FM Dropdown: Select dropdown for choosing from a list of options.
FM Multi-select dropdown: Dropdown that allows selecting multiple items from a list.
FM Multi-select menu item: Individual item inside a multi-select dropdown menu.
FM Checkbox: Binary choice (on/off) or multi-select from a list.
FM Radio button: Mutually exclusive choice. Use when user must select exactly one option.
FM Toggle: On/off switch for binary settings. Use for immediate-effect toggles.
FM Slider: Horizontal slider for selecting a value within a range.
FM Table Cell: Individual cell in a data table. Variants: Header, Text, Pill (tag/badge), Placeholder.
FM Table example: Pre-built example of a full data table with headers, rows, and cell content.
FM Badge: Small numerical or icon indicator. Use for counts or status markers.
FM Tag: Label for categorizing or identifying items. Can be removable or static.
FM Chip: Compact element representing a selection or filter. Can have outline style.
FM Alert: Inline feedback message. Variants for Success, Error, Info, Warning.
FM Banner: Persistent page-level notice bar. Use for important announcements.
FM Toast: Brief confirmation overlay. Appears temporarily after an action.
FM Dialog: Modal confirmation dialog. Use for destructive or important actions.
FM Empty State: Placeholder shown when a container has no content. Includes icon and CTA.
FM Progress bar: Horizontal bar indicating completion percentage of a task.
FM Spinner: Loading indicator for small, localized actions.
FM Tooltip: Small overlay with contextual help text. Triggered on hover.
FM Placeholder: Grey block placeholder for non-essential content areas in wireframes.
FM User: User avatar with name/email label. Use in headers, comments, or people pickers.
FM Cursor: Mouse cursor indicator for interaction demos.
FM Rich text field: Multi-line input with text formatting (bold, links, lists).
